not_claimed: pilot is edge-case discovery, not a statistical sample
pilot results are not full-corpus statistics
SPIRA PEP 770 V1 is a narrow consistency check, not full SBOM validation
v4_correction_note: V4 separates non-PyPI component-scoped SBOMs from wheel-scoped SBOM consistency. The V1 pilot inconsistencies became one SBOM_CONSISTENT and one NO_WHEEL_SCOPED_SBOM after manual review and V4 scope rules.
